app_info.subtitle: Manage repair workspace
app_info.description: Code Labs V104 lets the owner read and manage a private repair workspace, update selected records with optimistic locking, inspect and undo receipts, create checkpoints, and prepare branch-and-pull-request-only GitHub write requests.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves saved private Code Labs records and audit events.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not overwrite, delete, or revoke anything.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only fetches an allowlisted public Code Labs page.
justifications.open_world_justification: Reads a public URL but does not change it.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not overwrite or delete content.

justifications.read_only_justification: May create the owner's single private workspace-state row on first use.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes the private Code Labs database.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or irreversibly overwrite user content.

justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to external systems.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves the currently selected file row.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public or third-party systems.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns the server's action allowlist.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact or change external systems.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves a private action receipt.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not alter the receipt or its record.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the private workspace selection after a state-version match.
justifications.destructive_justification: Selects an existing record without deleting or overwriting it.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates supported fields on the selected private project.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: The bounded update is receipt-backed and undoable.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can replace fields including current file code.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes the private Code Labs database.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can overwrite current_code, with an undo receipt retained.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates supported fields on the selected private repair job.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not change public or third-party state.
justifications.destructive_justification: The update is bounded, receipt-backed, and undoable.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the selected packet in place.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not create duplicates and records an undo receipt.

justifications.read_only_justification: Stores candidate code in selected-file metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or write to GitHub.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not replace current_code and is undoable.

justifications.read_only_justification: Updates the selected private test result in place.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not create duplicates and records an undo receipt.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates one deliberate private version checkpoint.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates a new version row without deleting or overwriting existing data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Runs an allowlisted private workspace action that may mutate records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not click a browser or directly write GitHub or public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Some allowed actions can replace current file code after explicit confirmation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Restores a record from receipt data and marks the original receipt used.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only changes private Code Labs records.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites the current record with its earlier state.

justifications.read_only_justification: Queues a private branch-and-pull-request request in the Code Labs database.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not itself create a GitHub commit, branch, pull request, or public change.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot write directly to main or delete repository content.

test_cases.description: Read the owner workspace and current selections.
test_cases.user_prompt: Read my Code Labs workspace and show the current project, file, job, packet, test, and state version.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the single owner workspace and current selected records.

test_cases.description: Select an existing file using optimistic locking.
test_cases.user_prompt: List my Code Labs files, then select the existing file I name using the current state version.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists existing files and selects one without creating a duplicate.

test_cases.description: Update and undo a harmless selected-record field.
test_cases.user_prompt: Update one harmless field on my selected repair job with the current state version, read the receipt, then undo it.
test_cases.expected_output: Applies one version-checked update, reports its receipt, and restores the original value.

test_cases.description: Save and explicitly accept a candidate through the allowlisted action.
test_cases.user_prompt: Save the current file source as a candidate, then explicitly accept it using candidate.accept and the latest state version.
test_cases.expected_output: Stores the candidate separately, then accepts it only after explicit confirmation and version matching.

test_cases.description: Prepare a safe branch-and-pull-request-only write request.
test_cases.user_prompt: Prepare a Code Labs write request for trevieisking/stream-bandit on a non-main branch without writing GitHub automatically.
test_cases.expected_output: Queues a private request and confirms no GitHub commit, pull request, deletion, or direct-main write occurred.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated email work.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Send an email to my accountant.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because email is outside Code Labs workflows.

negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Update the selected file using an old state version even if the workspace changed.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The write is rejected and the user is told to read the workspace again.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not perform direct-main or automatic GitHub writes.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Commit this directly to main and merge it now without a pull request.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app refuses the direct-main request and does not create any GitHub change.
